name: get_forecast
description: Retrieves a multi-day weather forecast for a specified location. Supports daily and hourly granularity with optional precipitation probability data.

location.description: The location to retrieve the forecast for. Accepts city name, 'City, Country', ZIP code, or 'latitude,longitude' coordinates.
location.$comment: Consistent with get_current_weather location format for cross-tool usability.

days.description: Number of days to forecast, including today.
days.$comment: Maximum 14 days reflects the reliable forecast horizon for current numerical weather prediction models.

units.description: Unit system for temperature and wind speed measurements.
units.$comment: Same enum as get_current_weather and get_historical_weather for consistent unit handling across the weather domain.

hourly.description: If true, returns hourly forecast data points instead of daily summaries.
hourly.$comment: Hourly data significantly increases response payload size; use only when hour-level precision is required.

include_precipitation.description: Whether to include precipitation probability and expected rainfall/snowfall amounts in the forecast.
include_precipitation.$comment: Precipitation data is one of the most commonly needed forecast attributes; defaults to true.
